title: All Mob Heads
description: A datapack that allows the head drop of all mobs.
body:
![logo All Mob Heads](https://i.imgur.com/iAUqv3y.png)
# Loot every heads of every mob in the game !
- Each mob in the game can now drop their heads, thanks to this datapack.
- But the zombie, skeleton and creeper heads remain unchanged.
- To get them you will still have to blow a charged creeper next to them.
## You can summon different monsters that cannot be found in the game.
- You can summon an Illusioner by simply renamed a Vindicator "illusioner"
- You can summon a Zombie Horse by simply renamed a Skeleton Horse "zombie" (don't work in 1.21.11)
- You can summon The Killer Bunny by simply renamed a white rabbit "killer"
## You can change the color of a living shulker.
- Simply rename a shulker with a color you want.

red | orange | yellow | lime | green | blue | cyan | light_blue | pink | magenta | purple | brown | black | gray | light_gray | white
## You can get a colored slime head.
- Simply rename a slime with a color you want.

red | orange | yellow | lime | green | blue | cyan | light_blue | pink | magenta | purple | brown | black | gray | light_gray | white
## You can get a Nitwit Villager from every biome.
- Simply rename an unemployed villager "nitwit".
## You can have more than one head from a single mob.
- The Wither Boss has 4 different head.
- The Ghast has 2 different head.
- The Vex has 2 different head.
- The Strider has 2 different head.
## You have a collection system with advancements.
![advancements tab](https://i.imgur.com/RQlHG1s.png)

> If you're interested in hosting a server with this datapack, Use my code bellow!
![code promo bisect](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/851eaea2-eda5-4cef-87b0-a03c8608ac98.png)
